speaker: speaker1
text: What are the most popular sports in your country ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Swimming in summer and skating in winter.What ' s your favorite sport ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Jogging and bowling . Do you know how to practise Bungfu ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No I don't But l do Taijiquan or Shadow boxing.People everywhere in China usually do Taijiquan early in the morning.It can help people keep fit.It has a history of over three hundred years .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes . it is I can teach you if you like .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you . I can teach you how to bowl .
